name: Thai Iced Tea
intro: are listed below courtesy of thespruceeats.com.

ingredients.item: Ginger, large hand sized root (8 oz/200 g) peeled, the older the better

method: Cut up the ginger and place in a big pot of water on the stove. Sim- mer over low heat for at least 2 hours, until the water is infused with the ginger.
Drain and drink hot imme- diately, or save in the freezer for whenever you need it. If you prefer it a little sweet, just add a teaspoon of sugar or honey.
This ginger drink, when sweet- ened, is also a good base for fresh tofu and deep-fried dough bits—a common street food breakfast.
½ cup (125 ml) lime juice (fresh preferable)
